article.title: Uber SDE-2 || Backend || 2 YOE
article.content:
```
Education: CS from Tier 2 IIT
Years of Experience: 2Y
Prior experience: SWE-2 at Google/Hyderabad
Prior compensation: ~32 LPA
Date of offer: June 2025
Company: Uber
Title: L4
Location: Hyderabad, India
Base: 45 LPA (cash) + 3 (Retirals) LPA
Annual bonus:7 LPA (Variable can go upto 14 based on Perf. Although not mentioned in offer latter for some reason)
Stocks: 52K USD over 4 years (vested monthly)
Total first year comp: (Base + PF + Bonus + Stocks) 65 LPA
Benefits: Standard Uber benefits(70K per year for wellness + 50$ per month for Internet)

Felt RSUs are on a lower side but recruited told its the max they can offer. Will be joining it next month. 
```
